description_for_human: Bitcoin-native consulting, SEO audits, and daily innovation briefings by Conor Chepenik.
description_for_model: Binmucker provides AI-powered local business SEO audits, Bitcoin integration consulting, content creation, and daily Bitcoin innovation briefings. Use the /api/audit endpoint to run SEO audits. The /api/briefing endpoint generates daily Bitcoin innovation ideas. Services are priced in sats (Bitcoin satoshis) and payable via Lightning Network.
